title: Time-periodic oscillating Néel walls in ferromagnetic thin films
summary: This paper studies the existence, the structure and the spectral stability of time-periodic oscillating 180-degree Néel walls in ferromagnetic thin films. It is proved that time-periodic coherent structures do exist as solutions to the reduced model for the in-plane magnetization proposed by Capella, Melcher, and Otto (Nonlinearity 20 (2007), no. 11, 2519--2537) when a weak and $T$-periodic external magnetic field is applied in the direction of the easy axes of the film, perturbing in this fashion the well-known static 180-degree Néel wall. The linearization around this time-periodic Néel wall is constituted by a family of linear operators, parametrized by the time variable, which generates an evolution system of generators (or propagator) for the linear problem. Profiting from the stability of the static Néel wall, it is shown that the Floquet spectrum of the monodromy map for the propagator is contained in the complex unit circle, proving stability of the oscillating solution at least at a linear level.

AI.tldr: 证明了在弱周期外磁场作用下，铁磁薄膜中时间周期振荡的180度奈尔壁的存在性、结构及谱稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究铁磁薄膜中磁化动力学，在静态180度奈尔壁基础上，探索弱周期外磁场作用下时间周期振荡奈尔壁的存在性和稳定性
AI.techniques: 利用Capella-Melcher-Otto简化模型，采用线性化分析、演化系统理论、Floquet谱方法，结合静态奈尔壁稳定性结果
AI.main_theorems: 证明了时间周期相干结构的存在性；建立了线性化算子的演化系统；证明了单值映射的Floquet谱包含在复单位圆内，表明线性稳定性
AI.significance: 为铁磁薄膜中动态磁畴壁研究提供理论基础，对磁存储器件设计有潜在应用价值，扩展了静态磁畴壁到动态情形的理论框架

title: The sharp interface limit of the matrix-valued Allen-Cahn equation
summary: In this work, we study a matrix-valued Allen-Cahn equation with a Saint Venant-Kirchhoff potential $F(\mathbf{A})=\frac{1}{4}\|\mathbf{A}\mathbf{A}^\top-\mathbf{I}\|^2$. Our approach employs the modulated energy method together with weak convergence methods for nonlinear partial differential equations. This avoids the subtle spectrum analysis of the linearized operator at the so-called quasi-minimal orbits as well as the construction of asymptotic expansion. Moreover, it relaxes the assumption on the admissible initial data, which exhibits a phase transition along an initial interface. As a byproduct, we construct a weak solution to the limiting harmonic heat flow system with both minimal pair and Neumann-type boundary conditions across the interface.

AI.tldr: 使用调制能量方法研究具有Saint Venant-Kirchhoff势能的矩阵值Allen-Cahn方程，避免了线性化算子的谱分析和渐近展开构造
AI.motivation: 研究矩阵值Allen-Cahn方程在Saint Venant-Kirchhoff势能下的相变界面演化问题，传统方法需要复杂的谱分析和渐近展开，本文寻求更简洁的替代方法
AI.techniques: 调制能量方法与非线性PDE弱收敛方法相结合，避免了对线性化算子在拟极小轨道处的谱分析，也无需构造渐近展开
AI.main_theorems: 建立了矩阵值Allen-Cahn方程解的收敛性，放宽了初始数据的容许性假设，作为副产品构造了具有极小对和Neumann型边界条件的极限调和热流系统的弱解
AI.significance: 为相变界面演化问题提供了更简洁的分析框架，避免了传统方法的复杂技术，同时推广了初始数据条件，对材料科学中的相变建模有重要意义

title: A blow-up approach for a priori bounds in semilinear planar elliptic systems: the Brezis-Merle critical case
summary: We establish uniform a priori estimates for solutions of semilinear planar Hamiltonian elliptic systems in a ball with Dirichlet boundary conditions. We consider a broad class of coupled nonlinearities with asymptotic critical behaviour in the sense of Brezis--Merle. The approach we follow is based on a blow-up analysis combined with Liouville--type theorems and integral estimates. Our results extend the scalar theory of uniform a priori bounds to the Hamiltonian case, and solve an open problem in [de Figueiredo D.G., do Ó J.M., Ruf B., Adv. Nonlinear Stud. 6 (2006), no. 2]. We believe that this approach is new in this setting. As a consequence of our a priori estimates, we prove the existence of a positive solution by means of Fixed Point Index theory.

AI.tldr: 建立了半线性平面哈密顿椭圆系统在球域上Dirichlet边值问题解的一致先验估计
AI.motivation: 将标量情形的Brezis-Merle临界理论推广到哈密顿系统情形，解决de Figueiredo等人2006年提出的一个公开问题
AI.techniques: 爆破分析结合Liouville型定理和积分估计，使用不动点指数理论证明解的存在性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了具有Brezis-Merle临界行为的耦合非线性哈密顿系统的一致先验估计，并由此证明了正解的存在性
AI.significance: 将标量椭圆方程的一致先验估计理论扩展到哈密顿系统，为研究这类系统的解的存在性和正则性提供了新工具

title: Recovery of an Anisotropic Conductivity from the Neumann-to-Dirichlet Map in a Semilinear Elliptic Equation
summary:
We study the inverse boundary value problem of detecting a non-uniform conductivity motivated by pacing-guided ablation in cardiac electrophysiology. At the stationary level, the transmembrane potential $u$ in a region \(Ω\subset\mathbb{R}^3\) of cardiac tissue satisfies \[ -
abla\!\cdot(γ
abla u)+αu^3=0 \quad 	ext{in }Ω,\qquad γ
abla u\cdotν=g \quad 	ext{on }\partialΩ, \] where $γ$ is an anisotropic conductivity tensor and $α$ a nonlinear ionic response coefficient. The Neumann data $g$ represent pacing currents, and the boundary values $u|_{\partialΩ}$ correspond to invasive voltage measurements. Ischemic regions are modeled by a subdomain $D\subsetΩ$ where $γ$ is piecewise constant. We address the inverse problem of determining $γ$ from the Neumann-to-Dirichlet (NtD) map, assuming that $α$ and $D$ are known. To our knowledge, uniqueness in the case of NtD data with anisotropic conductivities in this nonlinear setting has not been analyzed in previous work. Using a first-order linearization around a nontrivial pacing current, we prove uniqueness for $γ$.

AI.tldr: 证明了在已知非线性系数α和缺血区域D的情况下，通过Neumann-to-Dirichlet映射唯一确定各向异性电导率张量γ
AI.motivation: 研究心脏电生理学中起搏引导消融的逆边界值问题，旨在通过边界测量检测心肌组织中的非均匀电导率分布，特别是缺血区域
AI.techniques: 使用一阶线性化方法，围绕非平凡起搏电流进行线性化，将非线性问题转化为线性逆问题进行分析
AI.main_theorems: 在已知非线性离子响应系数α和缺血区域D的情况下，通过Neumann-to-Dirichlet映射可以唯一确定各向异性电导率张量γ
AI.significance: 首次在非线性设置下分析了各向异性电导率从NtD映射的唯一性，为心脏电生理学中的逆问题提供了理论基础

title: Improved Interior Gradient Estimates for the Mean Curvature Equation under Nonlinear Assumptions
summary:
In this paper, we investigate interior gradient estimates for solutions to the mean curvature equation $$ \dive \left(  rac{
abla u}{\sqrt{1 + |
abla u|^2}} ight) = f(
abla u)$$ under various nonlinear assumptions on the right-hand side. Under the weakened initial assumption $u\in C^1(B_R) \cap C^3(\{|
abla u|>0\})$, we establish sharp gradient bounds that depend on the oscillation of the solution. These estimates are applicable to a wide class of nonlinear terms, including the specific forms arising from the elliptic regularization of the inverse mean curvature flow ($f=\varepsilon\sqrt{1+|
abla u|^2}$ ), minimal surface equation ($f=0$) and several polynomial and logarithmic growth regimes. As applications, the gradient bounds imply uniform ellipticity of the equation away from the critical set,which allows one to apply classical elliptic regularity theory and obtain higher regularity of solutions in the noncritical region. Moreover, when the solution grows at most linearly, all cases of our results can be applied in Moser's theory to establish the affine linear rigidity of global solutions. This directly leads to the Liouville-type theorems for global solutions without requiring additional proofs.

AI.tldr: 建立了平均曲率方程在非线性右端项下的尖锐梯度估计，推广了经典结果并应用于多种几何方程
AI.motivation: 研究平均曲率方程在非线性右端项下的正则性理论，特别是当解在临界集上只有C^1正则性时的梯度估计问题
AI.techniques: 使用Bernstein型方法、极大值原理、振荡估计，结合非线性右端项的特殊结构分析
AI.main_theorems: 在弱化假设u∈C^1(B_R)∩C^3({|∇u|>0})下，建立了依赖于解振荡的尖锐梯度界，适用于多种非线性项
AI.significance: 推广了经典平均曲率方程的梯度估计，为逆平均曲率流等几何流的正则性分析提供新工具，并导出Liouville型定理

title: Inner regularity and Liouville theorems for stable solutions to the mean curvature equation
summary:
Let $f\in C^1(\mathbb{R})$. We study stable solutions $u$ of the mean curvature equation \[ \operatorname{div}\left(  rac{
abla u}{\sqrt{1+|
abla u|^2}} ight) = -f(u) \qquad 	ext{in}\ Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n. \] In the local setting we prove that $
abla u$ satisfies inner Morrey regularity $M^{p_n}$, where \[ p_n := \left\{  egin{array}{ll} n,\qquad & 	ext{if}\ 2\leq n\leq 5, \  rac{n}{n-4\sqrt{n-1}+4},\qquad & 	ext{if}\ n\geq 6, \end{array} ight. \] together with the estimate \[ \|
abla u\|_{M^{p_n}(B_1)} \leq C \left( 1+\|
abla u\|_{L^1(B_2)} ight). \] The exponent $p_n$ is optimal for $n\leq5$, as shown by an explicit one-dimensional example. For radial solutions we show that the symmetry center is at most a removable singularity.
  Globally, we establish Liouville-type theorem: any stable solution satisfying the growth condition \[ |
abla u(x)| = \left\{  egin{array}{lll} o(|x|^{-1}) \ & 	ext{as}\ |x|ightarrow +\infty& 	ext{when}\ 2\leq n\leq 10, \ o(|x|^{-n/2+\sqrt{n-1}+1}) \ & 	ext{as}\ |x|ightarrow +\infty& 	ext{when}\ n\geq 11, \end{array} ight. \] must be constant. In particular, no nonconstant radial stable solution exists in dimensions \(2\leq n\leq6\), which highlights a global rigidity of stable radial solutions in low dimensions and extend the classical Liouville theorem of Farina and Navarro.
  Several exponents appearing in our results are new for mean curvature equations, showing both similarities and differences with the corresponding theorems for semilinear equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了平均曲率方程稳定解的内部Morrey正则性、径向解的奇点可去性以及Liouville型定理
AI.motivation: 研究平均曲率方程稳定解的正则性和整体性质，特别是与半线性方程结果的相似性和差异，扩展Farina和Navarro的经典Liouville定理
AI.techniques: 使用Morrey空间理论、稳定性条件、变分方法、径向对称性分析和奇点分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 内部Morrey正则性：∇u∈M^{p_n}且p_n最优；2. 径向解中心奇点可去性；3. Liouville型定理：满足增长条件的稳定解必为常数；4. 低维径向稳定解不存在性
AI.significance: 建立了平均曲率方程稳定解的正则性理论，揭示了与半线性方程的不同特征，扩展了经典Liouville定理，为几何偏微分方程理论提供了新工具

title: Density of Neumann regular smooth functions in Sobolev spaces of subanalytic manifolds
summary: We give characterizations of the bounded subanalytic $\mathscr{C}^\infty$ submanifolds $M$ of $\mathbb{R}^n$ for which the space of Neumann regular functions is dense in Sobolev spaces. By ``Neumann regular function'', we mean a function which is smooth at almost every boundary point and whose gradient is tangent to the boundary. In the case $p\in [1,2]$, we prove that the Neumann regular elements of $\mathscr{C}^\infty(\overline{M})$ are dense in $W^{1,p}(M)$ if and only if $M$ is connected at almost every boundary point. In the case $p$ large, we show that the Neumann regular Lipschitz elements of $\mathscr{C}^\infty(M)$ are dense in $W^{1,p}(M)$ if and only if $M$ is connected at every boundary point. The proof involves the construction of Lipschitz Neumann regular partitions of unity, which is of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 该论文给出了有界次解析光滑子流形上Neumann正则函数在Sobolev空间中稠密的特征刻画
AI.motivation: 研究有界次解析光滑子流形上Neumann正则函数（在几乎所有边界点光滑且梯度与边界相切的函数）在Sobolev空间W^{1,p}(M)中的稠密性问题，建立稠密性与流形边界连通性之间的精确关系
AI.techniques: 构造Lipschitz Neumann正则单位分解，使用次解析几何工具，分析边界连通性对函数逼近的影响，处理不同p值范围的差异
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当p∈[1,2]时，Neumann正则的C^∞(M̅)函数在W^{1,p}(M)中稠密当且仅当M在几乎所有边界点连通；2. 当p较大时，Neumann正则的Lipschitz C^∞(M)函数在W^{1,p}(M)中稠密当且仅当M在每个边界点都连通
AI.significance: 建立了Sobolev空间中函数逼近与几何拓扑性质之间的深刻联系，为边界值问题和变分方法提供了理论基础，构造的Neumann正则单位分解具有独立的理论价值
